PUBLISHER.ARIA_LABEL: Guides and information about fuel prices and trip cost
PUBLISHER.TITLE: Fuel prices and trip cost: how to use Gasolator with Italian data
PUBLISHER.INTRO: Gasolator helps drivers estimate fuel costs, compare Italian fuel stations and understand how consumption, distance and pump price affect a trip. You can use it to calculate a route or search fuel stations in an area.
PUBLISHER.TRIP_COST_TEXT: After you enter origin, destination, average consumption, fuel price and the Trip cost field, Gasolator estimates the cost from the route distance. Trip cost lets you add vehicle wear, possible tolls or other fixed costs for the route.
PUBLISHER.FUEL_PRICE_TITLE: Petrol, diesel, LPG and methane prices
PUBLISHER.FUEL_PRICE_TEXT: The fuel station feature shows available prices for Italy and lets you filter by fuel type and brand. When available, the station details also show when the price was updated.
PUBLISHER.METHOD_TEXT: Results depend on geocoding, fuel data availability and coordinate accuracy. If a street number is missing, search may return the closest street or area.
PUBLISHER.FAQ_ITALY_TITLE: Are fuel stations available outside Italy?
PUBLISHER.FAQ_ITALY_TEXT: No. Fuel price search is designed for Italian territory, where the data used by the app is available.
PUBLISHER.FAQ_PRICE_TEXT: No. The price is informational and may change. Always check the price displayed at the fuel station before refueling.

SHARE.TITLE: Gasolator route
SHARE.TEXT: Open this route in Google Maps

SIDEBAR.MODE_ROUTE_DESCRIPTION: Calculate trip cost, travel time and fuel stations along a route.
SIDEBAR.MODE_AREA_DESCRIPTION: Find fuel stations and prices within a selected radius. Fuel price data is available only in Italy.
SIDEBAR.SHOW_ROUTE_FUEL_STATIONS: Show fuel stations along the route
SIDEBAR.COST_FOR_DAY: Trip cost (vehicle wear, tolls or extras)
